final_text:
The evidence is clear. v1 explicitly states "PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2," and v2 is the "Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026." The claim's 21.71m matches the superseded v1 figure; the current authoritative value is 21.895m.
